name: Upstate Minestrone Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (1 - lb) Italian pear tomatoes, chopped, undrained
2 cans 10 3/4 oz beef boullion OR 3 beef boullion cubes plus
1 can (1 lb) Great Northern beans, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice sausage crosswise about 1/2 inch thick; brown in oil in deep saucepan or Dutch oven.
2. Add onion, garlic, carrots and basil; cook for 5 minutes.
3. Add zucchini, tomatoes with liquid, boullion, cabbage, salt and pepper.
4. Bring soup to boil; reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 1 hour.
5. Add beans with liquid; cook another 20 minutes.
6. Garnish with parsley.
